patient.query: I mean, I guess it’s not like I’ve actually tried it before. But I keep thinking about all the times I’ve put in effort and things just didn’t pan out. I can hear that little voice in my head saying, “Why bother? You’ll just end up in the same place.” It’s hard to shake that feeling, even if it’s not entirely fair or true.

automatic_thoughts: Why bother? You’ll just end up in the same place.

It sounds like you’re feeling pretty frustrated and discouraged, especially when you hear that “why bother” voice. That can make it hard to see any possibility of change.

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like you’re feeling frustrated and discouraged because past effort hasn’t seemed to pay off, and that inner voice telling you to give up feels pretty real. What would it feel like if you could imagine a different outcome?
